prompt:
Subject: Sunny cafe portrait selfie

Person/Expression: A Japanese woman in her late 20s, soft shoulder-length brown medium hair, natural glossy hair, transparent skin, natural makeup, slightly flushed cheeks, a gentle and friendly smile, looking naturally at the camera.

Clothing/Pose: A light blue loose knit cardigan and a white ribbed camisole, delicate gold necklace, small earrings, taking a selfie with a smartphone by extending one arm, relaxed upper body tilt.

Background/Light: Open-air cafe on a street corner, interior seen through glass windows, green trees and city scenery in the background, bright natural daylight, highlights like sunlight filtering through trees, fresh and pleasant atmosphere.

Composition/Camera: Vertical close-range selfie composition, intimate framing showing the face clearly, smartphone selfie perspective with arm in the foreground, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, lifestyle photography, high-definition portrait depiction.

Texture/Style: High-definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture, delicate hair details, realistic photographic expression, Japanese-style portrait, transparency, bright and clean tones, natural atmosphere suitable for social media.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, distorted body, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, unnatural background, text, logo, watermark.
